tasks.title: Group C - Synthetic PHI Corpus & Golden Findings
tasks.description: Build synthetic PHI test corpus covering the 15 unique detectable HIPAA identifier labels (16 HIPAA rows, but phone and fax share PHONE_NUMBER; photos and catch-all are out of scope) with golden findings JSON and a benchmark runner for validation, accuracy benchmarking, and regression-guarding

tasks.title: Group D - Filesystem Walker & Integration
tasks.description: Local filesystem walker with path resolution, skip patterns, symlink policy, max-depth limits, and end-to-end CLI integration (21 subtasks)
tasks.notes: Hardening concern carried from Task #3 dual review (Claude Sonnet 4.6 + Codex GPT-5, 2026-05-26): when the filesystem walker pipes findings through the detection layer, expand the recognizer collision tests from 'at least one entity fires' into expected entity/span precedence behaviour. A numeric token can match MEDICAL_RECORD_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, and DEVICE_IDENTIFIER simultaneously; if downstream redaction or reporting logic needs deterministic entity precedence over overlapping PHI spans, that dedup/priority contract must be defined and tested here rather than left implicit. OCR SCOPE ADDITION (2026-05-27): Task D now includes OCR capability for image-format files (PNG, JPG, TIFF, BMP) and image-only scanned PDFs. OCR engine: Tesseract via pytesseract, lang=eng, default PSM. The filesystem walker must detect file type and route image files through OCR text extraction before running the detection engine. The Group C corpus spec (docs/GROUP-C-CORPUS-SPEC.md) pins the exact OCR extraction command so corpus golden-finding offsets and benchmark extraction are consistent.

tasks.title: Group F - Phase 1 Exit Gate & Verification
tasks.description: Accuracy threshold validation, CLI functional tests on real fixture directory, documentation, and Phase 1 completion (1 subtask)

tasks.title: Group E - Cloud & Retention Services
tasks.description: Firestore connection layer with environment flag for local dev, retention policy evaluation, and cloud integration (4 subtasks)

tasks.title: Add PII to scope and capability
tasks.description: It doesn't look like across the project that PII scanning was in scope, and only PHI scanning is listed. We need you to add pii to the project and build scan capability for it.
